mapper.select: SELECT m.*, mem.member_nm AS member_nm, cd_sc.code_label AS sns_channel_cd_nm FROM mb_sns_member m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SNS_CHANNEL' AND cd_sc.code_value = m.sns_channel_cd WHERE m.sns_mem_id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, mem.member_nm AS member_nm, cd_sc.code_label AS sns_channel_cd_nm FROM mb_sns_member m LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sc ON cd_sc.code_grp = 'SNS_CHANNEL' AND cd_sc.code_value = m.sns_channel_cd
ORDER BY m.sns_mem_id ASC ORDER BY m.sns_mem_id DESC ORDER BY m.reg_date ASC ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC
